posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Save the date_social post-22160×2700 525 KB

If you’re part of this community, you probably already know - Elevate is worth showing up for.

And this year, it’s going to hit differently.

Most people will spend 2026 reacting to how work is changing.
Some will spend two days deciding how it changes for them.

That’s this community.
And we really hope to see you there.

Pre-register now for first access.

The road to Elevate starts now.
